login.overtimeExhausted: You have reached the maximum overtime allowed for today. Login is not possible.

work.title: Work Session
work.confirmCompleteMessage: Are you sure you want to mark this process as complete? This cannot be undone.
work.blockSent: Report submitted successfully. Waiting for approval.

checkout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to end your shift and check out?

offline.message: You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.

autoLogout.expired: Your shift has expired. Please check out.
autoLogout.loggedOutBody: Your work session was automatically closed because the auto-logout time was reached. To work overtime, please log in again.
